name: Smoked Turkey & Couscous Rolls
recipeIngredient: peeled and cut into thin strips
1 red bell pepper, cut lengthwise into 1/4-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, bring 1 cup water to a boil with 1 tablespoon olive oil, salt to taste, and turmeric.
2. Stir in the couscous, cover and let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons oil, the lime juice, the jalapeno, the scallion, the orange juice, the cilantro, salt, and pepper to taste. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Press about 2 tablespoons of the couscous mixture into the palm of one hand, forming a log.
5. Arrange the log across a short end of 1 turkey slice.
6. Place 1 avocado slice and 1 pepper strip along each side of the log.
7. Roll up the couscous, avocado, and bell pepper tightly in the turkey.
8. Cut the roll into 1-inch lengths with a sharp knife, trimming the ends.
9. Repeat steps 4-8 with the remaining ingredients to make additional rolls.
10. The rolls may be prepared up to 8 hours in advance and kept wrapped in plastic wrap and chilled.
